textPlain: This is an experiment from 2011 in which the author produced a font by averaging all the fonts on their system.I'm reposting it here because I noticed that this looks a lot like the uncanny valley produced when an image AI tries to make text, which makes perfect sense: it's a statistical average of fonts.
Yes, I saw the exact same thing when you posted it - "oh, AI text looks like an averaging of fonts".
